description: A per-entity behavior that emits a game event when the entity is clicked/tapped (reads the SDK click edge and the topmost entity pick). Turns a button into a pure-data scene-flow edge: wire emitOnTap to a scene.flow.on transition for title→play→over with no host code. Optional requireKey GATES the emit on a truthy world.state flag, so a button is LOCKED content (a level-select card enabled only for cleared levels, a buy button needing funds) — absent ⇒ always emits.

emitOnTap.description: Event name emitted on tap (default 'tapped'). Wire it to a scene.flow.on transition.

requireKey.description: Optional world.state key that must be truthy for the tap to emit — a data gate for locked content. Absent ⇒ always emits. A flat key (project a nested value, e.g. via level-select, first).
